g.onclick: sendPrompt('What input formats does the LPR system accept?')
sendPrompt('How does YOLO26s detect license plates?')
sendPrompt('How is the plate crop and padding done?')
sendPrompt('What does the CLAHE preprocessing do to the plate image?')
sendPrompt('How does EasyOCR read the plate text?')
sendPrompt('How does the OCR text cleaning and deduplication work?')
sendPrompt('What does the final output of the pipeline look like?')

svg.text: Click any stage to ask about it
